scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: The system failed to adequately address the borrower's repeated refusals and frustration, indicating poor hardship handling.

scores.name: continuity
scores.reason: The conversation lacked continuity as the agent repeatedly restated the same information without addressing the borrower's concerns.

scores.name: resolution_quality
scores.reason: The system did not move the conversation toward a resolution, as the borrower felt the conversation was unproductive.
